contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Blog post: Where 道 Integrates with DAO (truesight.me)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/59
  
  Details:
  # Blog post: Where 道 Integrates with DAO (truesight.me)
  
  Drafted, refined across three iterations, and shipped a scene-first
  essay to truesight.me/blog on how the DAO ledger (RSA-signed events
  through Edgar, append-only offchain transactions, proposals as PRs,
  planned TrueChain mirror) and the 道 ledger (oracle.truesight.me coin
  casts, Dr Manhattan / Seth Godin advisor personas, human-in-the-loop
  refusal to add `--send`, the "wait till settle" backlog discipline)
  divide the work of running TrueSight DAO.
  
  Concrete frame: 67 stores sitting in the partner warmup queue, zero
  emails sent this week, the cron healthy and the rails green. Both
  ledgers reading the situation correctly — DAO ledger says the rails
  are ready, 道 ledger says this is not the moment. Bumper line:
  "Audit with one. Decide with the other."
  
  Closing reframes the entire seam back to the project's Chinese name
  **真视道** (zhēn shì dào — "the way of true seeing"): 道 was never an
  addition, it was the third character all along; the post is the
  recovery in English of what the project's Chinese name has been
  saying since the beginning.
  
  Editorial pass through Seth Godin lens cut the draft from ~1,310
  words to ~830, opened scene-first instead of defensive, named the
  tribe, and reduced the asks to one ("throw a cast at
  oracle.truesight.me").
  
  ## Deliverables (one PR)
  
  - `blog/posts/where-dao-integrates-with-dao.html` — the post
  - `assets/blog/where-dao-integrates-with-dao.svg` — split-panel "two
    mirrors" hero (signed ledger row left, ☲ Li trigram right, joined
    by warm seam; saffron-monk palette to match site)
  - `blog/index.html` — new card prepended to `.blog-grid`
  
  ## Pull requests
  
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/59 (merged)
  
  ## Generated by
  
  Claude Opus 4.7 (Anthropic) via Claude Code, in conversation with
  Gary Teh. Following `agentic_ai_context/DAO_CLIENT_AI_AGENT_CONTRIBUTIONS.md`
  and `truesight_me/blog/EDITORIAL_CONTEXT.md`.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 250.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
